# Outbound LEARN-link health — last run

*Generated by `scripts/check-learn-links.ts` (ADR-051 Milestone L-E). Last run: **2026-05-10**.*

## Summary

- Total: **689**
- ✅ OK: **532** (77.2%)
- ↪️ Redirect: **0** (0.0%)
- 🔒 Forbidden / login wall: **37**
- ⌛ Timeout: **3**
- ⚠️ Error: **28**
- ❌ Dead: **89**

## Methodology

- HEAD request; falls back to GET only when the server replies 405. We never download bodies.
- Per-host timeout **8s** via AbortController.
- Concurrency cap **8** in-flight requests (polite default).
- User-Agent: `Orrery-LinkChecker/1.0 (+https://github.com/chipi/orrery; outbound-link health under ADR-051)` — operators can reach us via the linked repo.
- Login walls (401, 403) are reported separately from dead pages — they aren't broken, they're access-controlled.
